text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book "Markov Processes: Characterization and Convergence" by Stewart N. Ethier and Thomas G. Kurtz is a well-documented, real publication by John Wiley & Sons, confirmed on Wiley's own website, Google Books, Semantic Scholar, and multiple booksellers. The cited year of 2009 is a minor discrepancy — the paperback reissue appeared around 2005, with the original published in 1986 — but the title, authors, and publisher all match exactly.
LINK: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/book/10.1002/9780470316658
